title: Multi-tier eggless cakes for Westmead and Merrylands gatherings
summary:
Multi-tier eggless cake for an engagement or baby shower near Parramatta — that's not a niche order. That's a Thursday for us.

Families in Westmead, Merrylands, and Granville have been placing these orders since 2019. 100% eggless, every tier, every time. Custom design from your photo reference. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Sizes from 6-inch up to 16-inch, or stacked across tiers on your brief.

Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park. Open daily 11am to 10pm — which means you can pick up after work, after school, after dinner.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. 48 hours minimum. That's what fresh baking actually takes.
